summary: Comprehensive testing of Cosmic Zen new features: Mudras, Yantra, Tantra, Videos, Classes/Certifications, Frequencies, Soundscapes, Meditation audio, Oracle, Navigation More dropdown, Dashboard quick actions. Fixed critical React hooks bug in Navigation.js. All 31 backend API tests passed. All new pages working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: React hooks error: 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render' - caused by early return BEFORE useEffect hook
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved useEffect hook BEFORE the early return statement to maintain consistent hook order across renders

tests: GET /api/mudras - 9 mudras returned with all required fields
GET /api/yantras - 7 yantras returned with all required fields
GET /api/tantra - 6 practices returned with categories (energy, breathwork, mantra)

frontend_ui_tests.navigation: PASS - 8 primary nav items + More dropdown with 10 items
frontend_ui_tests.mudras_page: PASS - 9 mudras with expandable practice instructions
frontend_ui_tests.yantra_page: PASS - 7 yantras with SVG visuals, mantras, meditation instructions
frontend_ui_tests.videos_page: PASS - 10 videos with 8 category filters and thumbnails
frontend_ui_tests.classes_page: PASS - 5 classes with tabs (Catalog/Enrolled/Certifications), lesson details, progress tracking
frontend_ui_tests.frequencies_page: PASS - 12 frequencies with play/stop buttons, visual waveform
frontend_ui_tests.soundscapes_page: PASS - 9 ambient sound channels with volume sliders
frontend_ui_tests.meditation_page: PASS - 5 duration options, 6 ambient sounds, Begin Session button
frontend_ui_tests.profile_page: PASS - Shows sign-in prompt when logged out
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_page: PASS - 17 quick action buttons after login

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in Soundscapes.js line 177: channelsRef.current cleanup issue - minor, does not affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Mudras, Yantra, Tantra, Videos, Classes, Frequencies, Soundscapes, Meditation audio, Oracle, Navigation More dropdown, Dashboard) are fully functional. Fixed critical React hooks bug in Navigation.js. Backend has 31 passing tests. Audio features use Web Audio API and are working. Classes enrollment/completion/certification flow is working with MongoDB persistence.
